# Trooper — Complete Reference

> AI Workforce Platform Powered by OpenClaw — Deploy autonomous AI employees that execute real tasks using GitHub, Gmail, browsers, and APIs.

## Company Overview

Trooper is an AI workforce platform that transforms how teams work by deploying autonomous AI employees powered by OpenClaw technology. Unlike simple chatbots, Trooper AI agents perform real work: making GitHub commits, sending emails, browsing the web, managing files, and executing complex multi-step workflows.

The platform evolved from ClawdBot (a single AI assistant) into a full multi-agent workforce system (MoltBot evolution), enabling teams to scale their AI capabilities across multiple specialized agents.

## Platform Architecture

### AI Workforce Teams
Deploy teams of AI employees, each specialized for different tasks. Agents collaborate, share context, and work in parallel to complete complex projects.

### OpenClaw Foundation
Built on the OpenClaw open-source AI framework, providing:
- Standardized skill definitions and installation
- Cross-platform agent compatibility
- Community-driven skill marketplace
- Extensible plugin architecture

## Core Features

### 1. GitHub Integration
- AI agents make real commits to repositories
- Automated pull request creation and review
- Branch management and merge conflict resolution
- Code review with intelligent suggestions
- Integration with GitHub Actions workflows

### 2. Task Execution
- Multi-step autonomous task completion
- Task decomposition and planning
- Progress tracking and reporting
- Error handling and retry logic
- Parallel task execution across agents

### 3. Persistent Memory
- Agents remember context across sessions
- Project-specific knowledge retention
- Team-wide shared memory
- Configurable memory scopes (agent, project, organization)

### 4. Browser Control
- AI agents navigate and interact with any website
- Form filling and data extraction
- Screenshot capture and visual verification
- Multi-tab and multi-window support
- Headless and visual browser modes

### 5. System Access
- Secure terminal command execution
- File system read/write operations
- API integration and webhook handling
- Environment variable management
- Sandboxed execution environments

### 6. Email Automation
- Gmail integration for sending/receiving
- Template-based email composition
- Attachment handling
- Email thread management
- Scheduled email campaigns

### 7. Skills & Plugins (3,000+ Available)
The OpenClaw Skills ecosystem provides installable capabilities:
- Install via: npx clawhub@latest install <skill-name>
- Manual install: copy to ~/.openclaw/skills/ (global) or <project>/skills/ (workspace)
- Categories: Coding, Browser, Data, DevOps, Testing, Documentation, Security, Design, and more
- Community-contributed and officially maintained skills
- Full catalog: https://trooper.so/integration

### 8. Multi-Agent Collaboration
- Multiple AI agents working on the same project
- Inter-agent communication and task delegation
- Specialized agent roles (coder, reviewer, tester, writer)
- Conflict resolution between agents
- Orchestrated workflows

### 9. Chat Interfaces
- Conversational UI for interacting with AI workforce
- Natural language task assignment
- Real-time progress updates
- Multi-channel support (web, Slack, Discord, WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal)

### 10. Messaging Channels
Dedicated setup pages for each OpenClaw messaging channel:
- Hub: https://trooper.so/channels
- Slack, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Signal, iMessage, Email

## AI Team Pages

Role-specific marketing pages for deploying Trooper units:
- Coding (multi-agent harness): https://trooper.so/teams/coding
- Marketing: https://trooper.so/teams/marketing
- Sales: https://trooper.so/teams/sales
- Legal: https://trooper.so/teams/lawyers
- Engineering: https://trooper.so/teams/engineering
- Operations: https://trooper.so/teams/operations

## Pricing

Available at: https://trooper.so/pricing
Subscription-based model starting at $7/month.

## Skills Catalog

Browse and search 3,000+ OpenClaw skills at: https://trooper.so/integration

### Skill Categories
- Coding Agents & IDEs
- Browser Automation
- Data & Analytics
- DevOps & Infrastructure
- Testing & QA
- Documentation
- Security
- Design & UI
- Communication
- Project Management
- And many more...

### Installing Skills
```
npx clawhub@latest install <skill-name>
```

### Skill Structure
Each skill includes:
- SKILL.md: Main skill definition and instructions
- _meta.json: Metadata (name, description, category, tags)
- EXAMPLES.md: Usage examples
- REFERENCE.md: Detailed reference documentation
- setup.json: Configuration and dependencies

## Integration Partners

Trooper integrates with popular tools and platforms. Browse all integrations at: https://trooper.so/integration

## Getting Started

1. Sign up at https://app.trooper.so
2. Connect your GitHub repositories
3. Deploy your first AI agent
4. Install relevant skills from the catalog
5. Assign tasks and watch your AI workforce execute

## Contact & Support

- Website: https://trooper.so
- Twitter: @trooper_so
- Support: Available via in-app chat (Channel.io)
